# Salesforce AgentForce Developer Guide

## April 2026 — Terminology Change
- Agent topics are now called **subagents**
- No changes to underlying functionality
- Both terms may appear in documentation during the transition period

## Developer Guide Content
- Agent Script
- Agentforce DX
- APIs/SDKs
- Prompt Builder features

## Reference APIs
- Agent API (connected apps and tokens for agent communication)
- Agentforce Python SDK (programmatic agent creation/management/deployment)
- Agentforce Mobile SDK (native iOS and Android integration)
- Models API (Apex classes and REST endpoints connecting to LLMs)
- Testing API (Metadata API and Connect API endpoints for AI agent tests)
- Citations API
